com.nexacro.java.xapi.tx

Class HttpPlatformRequest

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.nexacro.java.xapi.tx.PlatformRequest
      • com.nexacro.java.xapi.tx.HttpPlatformRequest

  • public class HttpPlatformRequest
extends PlatformRequest

    receive data(PlatformData) by HTTP request.

    Author:
    Choi, Jongkwan

    • Method Detail

      • getProperty

        public java.lang.Object getProperty(java.lang.String key)
        Return property Return value to. Settable property value are as below.
        property data type valid value basic value detail
        http.getparameter.register String true or false false HTTP GET data enlist status when data reception
        http.getparameter.asvariable String true or false false transmission possibility when HTTP GET data enlistment; if false, transform HTTP GET data to DataSet type
        Overrides:
        getProperty in class PlatformRequest
        Parameters:
        key - property name
        Returns:
        property name
        See Also:
        setProperty(String, Object)

      • setProperty

        public void setProperty(java.lang.String key,
                        java.lang.Object value)
        Set property value.
        Overrides:
        setProperty in class PlatformRequest
        Parameters:
        key - property name
        value - property value
        See Also:
        getProperty(String)

      • receiveData

        public void receiveData()
                 throws PlatformException
        Receive data(PlatformData) from HTTP request. If transmission/reception type(contentType) is undefined, decide from HTTP header ContentType value, and applied as below.
        HTTP Header ContentType Applied transmission/reception type(contentType)
        text/xml PlatformType.CONTENT_TYPE_XML
        application/octet-stream PlatformType.CONTENT_TYPE_BINARY
        Other PlatformType.DEFAULT_CONTENT_TYPE
        Overrides:
        receiveData in class PlatformRequest
        Throws:
        PlatformException

      • getContentType

        public java.lang.String getContentType()
        Return transmission/reception type(contentType). transmission/reception type indicates data expression type as XML, Binary.
        Returns:
        transmission/reception type
        See Also:
        PlatformType.CONTENT_TYPE_XML, PlatformType.CONTENT_TYPE_BINARY, PlatformType.CONTENT_TYPE_SSV, PlatformType.CONTENT_TYPE_JSON

      • setContentType

        public void setContentType(java.lang.String contentType)
        Set transmission/reception type(contentType). transmission/reception type indicates data expression type as XML, Binary.
        Parameters:
        contentType - transmission/reception type
        See Also:
        PlatformType.CONTENT_TYPE_XML, PlatformType.CONTENT_TYPE_BINARY, PlatformType.CONTENT_TYPE_SSV, PlatformType.CONTENT_TYPE_JSON

      • getProtocolType

        public java.lang.String getProtocolType(int index)
        Return protocol type(protocolType). protocol type indicates data transformation type as compression and encryption.
        Parameters:
        index - location
        Returns:
        protocol type
        See Also:
        PlatformType.PROTOCOL_TYPE_ZLIB

      • addProtocolType

        public void addProtocolType(java.lang.String protocolType)
        Add protocol type(protocolType). protocol type indicates data transformation type as compression and encryption.
        Parameters:
        protocolType - protocol type
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - When adding repetition of protocol type
        See Also:
        PlatformType.PROTOCOL_TYPE_ZLIB

        index - location

      • isVerbose

        public boolean isVerbose()
        Inspect INFO log output status. Basic value is "false", and log is only outputted when logging component INFO log is set to output, and verbose is "true".
        Returns:
        INFO log output status
        See Also:
        setVerbose(boolean)

      • setVerbose

        public void setVerbose(boolean verbose)
        Set INFO log output status.
        Parameters:
        verbose - INFO log output status
        See Also:
        isVerbose()
